hook.summary: Satisfying multi-row clear of golden blocks with 'THIS FEELING!' text.
hook.visual_action: A yellow T-block drops into a slot, triggering a massive row clear.

scene_flow: A T-shaped block completes a large section of golden blocks, triggering a satisfying clear.
A celebratory dancer is overlaid as 'Combo 5 Unbelievable!' appears on screen.
Rapid-fire block clears continue with high scores and colorful particle effects.
The dancer performs various poses against a backdrop of exploding blocks.
Final end card displays the game title, download links, and a search bar animation.
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle game players who enjoy high-energy, satisfying visual feedback and combo-based gameplay.
